title: denckea crinita
intro: Denckea crinita, also known as the hairy denckea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is a shrub-like plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Japan and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in digestion, making it a popular remedy in traditional Japanese medicine. Denckea crinita can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in the production of various herbal remedies, including tinctures and ointments.
